research_equation: harness-updating ∦ base capability (flat) \ harness-benefit ⨆ base capability (inverted-U)
direction_finding_path: Noticed that end-to-end scores in self-evolving agents conflate two roles (evolver vs solver) → cross-pairing matrix as natural experiment → unexpected flatness on evolver side → deeper dive on agent side → two failure modes

challenge_to_module.end_to_end_confound: Formal separation of harness-updating and harness-benefit

per_module_hidden_assumptions.Δ_benefit_max: Using max assumes the practical scenario where an oracle can pick the best evolver, which may overstate real-world benefit
per_module_hidden_assumptions.HFR_pipeline: Single judge model (Sonnet 4.6) assumes judge bias is negligible after blinding
per_module_hidden_assumptions.harness_scope: Different editable components per benchmark (skills only vs skills+prompts+memory) adds uncontrolled variance

citation_functions.self_evolution_citations: Establish that end-to-end evaluation is standard and confirm the evaluation gap
citation_functions.harness_engineering_citations: Define what a harness is and what components are editable

reviewer_lens_summary.verdict: Weak accept / strong borderline — strong analysis paper for an analysis track; would need a methods contribution for a main track

reusable_story_pattern: Macro pattern → micro pattern → mechanism drill-down → root cause → actionable guidance. Each section answers 'So what?'
strongest_future_idea: Construct adversarial harness tests to causally separate activation and adherence as independent skills
